untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tick-sensitive order conditions with dynamic limit price adjustments based on tick direction reconfirmation and latch logic. The allowed indicator set does not include tick direction primitives (uptick/downtick/zero-tick classification) or dynamic limit price adjustment mechanisms. These are order execution features, not price-based technical indicators. Approximated with close vs prev_close comparison, but this loses the nuanced tick-type and limit-price-latch semantics.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Buy entry when close <= prev_close (downtick/zero-downtick proxy for longs); Sell entry when close >= prev_close (uptick/zero-uptick proxy for shorts). Exit on tick reversal approximated as sustained reversal beyond 1 bar. However, this translation cannot capture: (1) True tick classification (uptick vs downtick vs zero-tick), (2) Dynamic limit price adjustment on direction reconfirmation, (3) Latch behavior on directional reconfirmation, (4) Order validity conditions tied to tick state. A proper implementation requires tick-level order state management outside the indicator framework.
